summary: Iteration 29 - New Features Testing Complete. 20/20 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: Bottom nav 'Legal' tab with Scale icon, Legal page with 6-point Indian gaming law compliance section (bilingual EN+HI), Hot Contests Instagram Stories-style circles with rotating ring animation, 200-question pool seed endpoint, 5-Template Match Engine (1 full_match + 4 in_match with 55 total questions).

backend.health_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status
backend.admin_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for admin
backend.player_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for player
backend.ipl_points_table_team_structure: PASS - Each team has shortname, wins, loss, matches fields
backend.live_ticker_returns_scores: PASS - GET /api/cricket/live-ticker returns IPL match scores
backend.live_ticker_match_structure: PASS - Each match has id, t1, t2, ms, status fields
backend.seed_question_pool_categories: PASS - Categories: batting=40, bowling=35, powerplay=25, death_overs=25, match=30, player_performance=25, special=20
backend.questions_are_bilingual: PASS - Questions have both EN and HI text
backend.auto_templates_for_match: PASS - Creates 5 templates (1 full_match + 4 in_match) with 55 questions
backend.auto_templates_idempotent: PASS - Calling twice doesn't create duplicates
backend.auto_templates_all: PASS - POST /api/admin/auto-templates-all bulk generates for all upcoming matches
backend.template_has_phase_routing: PASS - In-match templates have innings_range and phase_label

frontend.legal_tab_text: PASS - Legal tab shows 'Legal' text with Scale icon
frontend.ipl_points_table: PASS - data-testid='ipl-points-table' found with 4 team rows visible
frontend.live_ticker: PASS - data-testid='live-ticker' found with 12 ticker items
frontend.wallet_page: PASS - data-testid='wallet-page' loaded on Legal tab click
frontend.legal_points_0_to_5: PASS - All 6 legal points found (legal-point-0 through legal-point-5)
frontend.team_drawer: PASS - data-testid='team-drawer' opens on team row click
frontend.team_matches_in_drawer: PASS - Found 14 team matches in drawer

critical_code_review_comments: admin.py: seed-question-pool endpoint correctly seeds 200 bilingual questions with force=true option
admin.py: auto-templates endpoint creates exactly 5 templates (1 full_match + 4 in_match) with 55 total questions
admin.py: TEMPLATE_CONFIGS defines phase routing with innings_range, over_start, over_end, answer_deadline_over
question_seed.py: generate_200_questions() creates questions with EN+HI text, auto_resolution config, and correct category distribution
BottomNav.jsx: 'Wallet' tab renamed to 'Legal' with Scale icon from lucide-react
WalletPage.jsx: LEGAL_POINTS array contains 6 Indian gaming law compliance points with bilingual titles
WalletPage.jsx: Legal section has data-testid='legal-section' and legal-point-0 through legal-point-5
HomePage.jsx: Hot contests rendered as Instagram Stories-style circles with SVG rotating ring
App.css: .contest-ring-spin animation rotates 360deg over 8s linear infinite
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified new features: (1) POST /api/admin/seed-question-pool?force=true seeds 200 bilingual questions with categories batting=40, bowling=35, powerplay=25, death_overs=25, match=30, player_performance=25, special=20, (2) POST /api/admin/matches/{match_id}/auto-templates creates 5 templates per match (1 full_match with 15 questions + 4 in_match with 10 questions each = 55 total), (3) POST /api/admin/auto-templates-all bulk generates for all upcoming matches, (4) Bottom nav 'Wallet' tab renamed to 'Legal' with Scale icon, (5) Legal page (WalletPage.jsx) has balance card + transaction history + 6-point legal section with bilingual EN+HI text, (6) Hot Contests section shows Instagram Stories-style circular cards with slow rotating ring animation (.contest-ring-spin), (7) All existing features still work: IPL Points Table, Live Ticker, Team drill-down drawer, Match full-data view

features_verified.auto_templates_all_api: VERIFIED - Bulk generates templates for all upcoming matches
